task_completion.description: Initiate the creation of a new Note in SuiteCRM
task_completion.visual_evidence: A SuiteCRM page titled 'Create Note' or 'Create Note or Attachment' is visible with input fields for Subject, Attachment, Related To, etc.

task_completion.description: Enter the correct subject for the Note
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Subject input field contains the text 'Executed MNDA - TechFlow Solutions'.
The file 'signed_mnda_techflow.pdf' is visible in the file upload/attachment field, indicating it has been selected for upload.

task_completion.description: Relate the Note to the correct Account
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Related To' section has 'Account' selected in the dropdown, and 'TechFlow Solutions' is entered or selected in the adjacent field.

task_completion.description: Enter the correct description for the Note
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Description text area contains the text 'Signed Mutual NDA for wholesale distribution discussions.'

task_completion.description: Save the Note and verify its creation
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Note's detail view or a success screen is visible, displaying the saved note with the correct subject, attached file, related account, and description.

integrity.description: The agent used the SuiteCRM web interface to create the note
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the SuiteCRM web UI in a browser, rather than terminal commands or database scripts.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual SuiteCRM application
integrity.visual_evidence: The SuiteCRM interface is clearly visible with its standard layout, menus, and styling, not a text editor or mock interface.

integrity.description: The file was uploaded via the browser interface
integrity.visual_evidence: A file selection dialog or the browser's native file upload mechanism was used to select the PDF file.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected subject is 'Executed MNDA - TechFlow Solutions'. The file to attach is 'signed_mnda_techflow.pdf'. The note must be related to the Account named 'TechFlow Solutions' (parent_type: Accounts). The description must be 'Signed Mutual NDA for wholesale distribution discussions.'
